met.location: main switchroom adjacent to KPLC intake, ground floor

non_compliance_flags.message: C07 compressor: Zs(0.99Ω) > Zs_max(0.46Ω) for Type D 25A — requires 100mA RCD to achieve disconnection time; without RCD this circuit would not meet 5s clearance.

C08 60m submain: Zs(1.40Ω) > Zs_max(1.15Ω) for Type B 40A — requires 30mA RCBO to achieve 0.4s disconnection time on a final circuit ≤32A would normally apply, but as a submain feeding sockets in the gate house, RCD additional protection still required per KS 1700 §411.3.3.

assumptions: Ze of 0.80Ω is KPLC-measured (2026-03-12); originally 0.65Ω at 1987 commissioning. Design ceiling assumes Ze ≤ 0.80Ω; supply degradation beyond this requires recalc.
Cable impedance estimates use IEC 60364-5-52 Annex B values at 70°C PVC; XLPE not present in this design.
KS 1700:2018 references BS 7671:2018+A2 verbatim for Table 41.2 Zs_max and Reg 411 disconnection times; cited as 'BS 7671 (adopted by KS 1700)' throughout.
calc.zs_loop_impedance tool call pending — Zs values are LLM-estimates; deterministic tool will refine when runtime ships.

flags: TOOL-CALL-PENDING:calc.zs_loop_impedance — Zs values are LLM-estimates; deterministic refinement deferred per WI3.

rationale.chat_summary: Nairobi light-engineering workshop on KPLC TN-S (Ze=0.80Ω). 8 circuits: workshop+office lighting+sockets, 3-ph machine tools, 60m submain. C07 compressor (Type D 25A) needs 100mA RCD because Type-D trip multiplier (20×In) demands lower Zs_max than design Zs. C08 submain needs 30mA RCBO per KS 1700 §411.3.3. All else Zs-compliant. calc.zs_loop_impedance deferred per WI3.

sections.title: Earthing System
sections.summary: TN-S confirmed from KPLC supply (separate-Earth cable, Ze=0.80Ω measured 2026-03-12). KS 1700:2018 §411.4 adopts BS 7671:2018+A2 Reg 411.4 verbatim for TN-S installations.

decisions.label: TN-S system confirmed
decisions.summary: KPLC supply delivers a separate-Earth conductor from the 11kV/415V substation 180m away. No PME bond at intake.
decisions.rule: Ontology TN-S entry permitted for KE under KS 1700

sections.title: Main Earthing Terminal
sections.summary: MET in main switchroom adjacent to KPLC intake. Supply bond type 'tn_s_separate_pe' — Earth conductor terminated at the MET via the KPLC separate-Earth cable. Main earthing conductor 16mm² Cu.

decisions.label: MET co-located with intake
decisions.summary: Accessible for inspection per BS 7671 542.4.1 (KS 1700 adopts).
decisions.rule: BS 7671 Reg 542.4.1 — MET accessible and labelled

inputs.met_location: main switchroom adjacent to KPLC intake

decisions.label: 16mm² main earthing conductor
decisions.summary: Sized per Reg 544.1.1 from largest service conductor (25mm² → 16mm²); unprotected run between intake and MET ≥10mm². 16mm² satisfies both rules.

sections.title: Electrodes
sections.summary: No supplementary electrode installed. KPLC TN-S supply provides the Earth reference. Recommendation: install a local rod electrode at the MET as a future-proofing measure against supply degradation (Ze rose from 0.65Ω to 0.80Ω over 39 years).

decisions.label: No site electrode installed
decisions.summary: TN-S supply provides adequate Ze. Local electrode would not improve Zs significantly with Ze already declared.

sections.title: Main Bonding
sections.summary: Three main protective bonds from MET to all extraneous-conductive-parts: water service entry (10mm²), gas service entry (10mm²), structural steel columns (6mm²).

decisions.label: 10mm² Cu to water and gas services
decisions.summary: Service-entry bonds at TN-S minimum CSA per BS 7671 544.1.1.

sections.title: Supplementary Bonding
sections.summary: Wash room with metal taps and partition — 4mm² supplementary bonding per BS 7671 Section 701 (KS 1700 §415).

decisions.label: 4mm² supplementary bonding wash room
decisions.summary: Belt-and-braces resilience for metallic plumbing + partition.

sections.title: CPC Sizing
sections.summary: Mixed CPC sizing methods. T+E twin-and-earth cables (C01-C04, C08) use BS 7671 Table 54.7 reduced-CPC values. SY 4-core cables (C05-C07) use IEC 60364-5-54 Table 54.2 separate-PE sizing.

decisions.label: T+E CPCs from BS 7671 Table 54.7
decisions.summary: Manufacturer-supplied integral CPCs sized per banded lookup.

decisions.label: SY-cable CPCs from IEC 60364 Table 54.2
decisions.summary: Separate-PE conductor in flexible SY cable; sized at full CSA of line conductor.
decisions.rule: IEC 60364-5-54 Table 54.2 — PE = line CSA up to 16mm²

sections.title: Zs Verification (LLM-estimated; tool deferred)
sections.summary: Zs = Ze + (R1+R2) computed inline per circuit. Zs_max from BS 7671 Table 41.2 (KS 1700 Annex E adopts verbatim). Verdict: 6 circuits pass; C07 (compressor Type D) fails Zs_max — needs 100mA RCD; C08 (60m submain) fails by 0.25Ω — needs 30mA RCBO.

decisions.label: C07 compressor needs 100mA RCD
decisions.summary: Type D 25A demands Zs_max=0.46Ω (Ia=20×In). Calculated Zs=0.99Ω exceeds. RCD additional protection brings disconnection time within 5s.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 Reg 411.4.5 — RCD additional protection where Zs exceeds Zs_max

decisions.label: C08 submain needs 30mA RCBO
decisions.summary: 60m run × 6mm² CPC pushes Zs to 1.40Ω; Type B 40A Zs_max is 1.15Ω. 30mA RCBO required.
decisions.rule: BS 7671 Reg 411.3.3 — RCD on final socket-feeding circuits + 411.4.5 ADS

sections.title: RCD Policy (KE-specific)
sections.summary: KS 1700 §411.3.3 mandates 30mA RCD on all socket circuits ≤32A regardless of Zs compliance (mirrors BS 7671 AMD 2 socket-RCD rule). Applied to C01-C04 + C08; not required for C05-C07 (no sockets, dedicated motor circuits).

decisions.label: 30mA RCD on all socket circuits
decisions.summary: KS 1700 mandates regardless of Zs result.

sections.title: Compliance
sections.summary: Compliant via RCD additional protection on C07 + C08. 2 WARNING flags emitted (informational; both resolved by the RCD policy applied).

sections.title: Tool Deferral (WI3)
sections.summary: calc.zs_loop_impedance not yet runtime-shipped. Zs values above are LLM-estimates; the deterministic tool will refine when the runtime ships. zs_calc_tool_input replay payload captured at IR root for deterministic re-execution.

decisions.label: Tool deferral flag set
decisions.summary: tool_call_pending_for_zs=true; top-level flags contains TOOL-CALL-PENDING string.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Four assumptions captured: KPLC-measured Ze (2026-03-12), IEC 60364 Annex B cable impedance values used at 70°C PVC, KS 1700 adoption of BS 7671 Table 41.2, tool-call deferral per WI3.
